Sarah R. Nichols, Esq., Tori Arnau, Esq., NICHOLS LAW, P.C. 415) 710-9116 sarah@nicholslawyer.com/tori@nicholslawyer.com Attorneys for Plaintiff DINA ZELIKSON
Min K. Kim, Esq., Ford & Harrison LLP (213) 237-2400 mkim@fordharrison.com Attorneys for Defendant, SALESFORCE, INC

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Hearing is held. Discussed, not ARGUED.

PLAINTIFF DINA ZELIKSON'S Motion To Quash Defendant Salesforce, Inc.'S Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Consumer Records (Dr. Carl E. Bricca, D.O.).

Parties agree to a stipulated order. Moving party to prepare and submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312 to Judge pro Tem William Lynn at williamclynn@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Feb-28-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2024 Set For Trial On Dec-02-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Quash Defendant Salesforce, Inc.'S Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Consumer Records (Dr. Carl E. Bricca, D.O.)
Off Calendar Feb-15-2024 Continued To Mar-07-24 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Sarah R. Nichols, Esq., NICHOLS LAW, P.C. (415) 710-9116 sarah@nicholslawyer.com, Attorney for Plaintiff DINA ZELIKSON
Min K. Kim, Esq. Ford & Harrison LLP (213) 237-2400 mkim@fordharrison.com Attorney for Defendant SALESFORCE, INC.

Plaintiff's counsel partialy stipulates to Judge Pro Tem William Lynn continuing this motion for further hearing but does not stipulate to him deciding on today's motion. Defense counsel stipulates to Judge Pro Tem William Lynn deciding today's motion. Clerk is authorized to sign the stipuation on behalf of counsel and court.

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF DINA ZELIKSON'S Motion To Quash Defendant Salesforce, Inc.'S Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Consumer Records (Dr. Carl E. Bricca, D.O.) is continued for further hearing to March 7, 2024 at 1:30 p.m. If the issues addressed during today's hearing are resloved prior to March 7, 2024, parties may submit a proposed order to Judge Pro Tem William Lynn at williamclynn@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)
